data.title: Brainstorm UX understanding loop: inject high-level design principles for UI features
data.description:
Follow-on epic stub — needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation (scrutiny:pending).

## Context
When brainstorm processes a feature with UI creation or modification intent, agents currently receive no design guidance during the Phase 1 understanding loop. This epic adds a second understanding loop that fires only when UI elements are detected, with distinct gating dimensions focused on UX intent (user context, interaction patterns, accessibility requirements, government-specific concerns). Queries the ref-query.sh retrieval contract established by epic 0b7c-d811 at Summary tier for high-level principles.

## Success Criteria
- Brainstorm detects UI-related feature intent and triggers a second Phase 1 loop with UX-specific gating dimensions
- UX understanding loop queries .claude/scripts/dso ref-query at Summary tier; injects only principle-level entries relevant to the detected domain
- UX loop does not fire for non-UI features; gate is bypassed cleanly with no output
- Injected guidance appears in the brainstorm dialogue context before approach proposals

## Dependencies
- Epic 0b7c-d811 (ref-query.sh retrieval contract) must be complete before this epic can be implemented
